---
title: "QB Pocket Pressure Analysis (PRSS) — Rolling Window Comparison"
output: html_notebook
---

## 1. 加载库

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(deldir)
library(nflfastR)
library(zoo)
library(ggrepel)
```

---

## 2. 读取数据

```{r load-data, message=FALSE}
# BUG FIX: 原来用 read.csv() 读 parquet，应用 read_parquet()
tracking_data <- read_parquet("../data/processed/bdb-tracking-all.parquet")

plays   <- read_csv("../data/bdb/plays.csv",            show_col_types = FALSE)
players <- read_csv("../data/bdb/players.csv",           show_col_types = FALSE)
pff     <- read_csv("../data/bdb/pffScoutingData.csv",   show_col_types = FALSE)
games <- read_csv("../data/bdb/games.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

---

## 3. 数据清洗与合并

```{r clean-data}
tracking_data <- left_join(tracking_data, 
                           games %>% select(gameId, week), 
                           by = "gameId")

# When nflId is NA, row corresponds to ball. (numeric)
tracking <- tracking_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(nflId)) %>%
  left_join(
    players %>% select(nflId, officialPosition, displayName),
    by = "nflId"
  )

# create 'real pressure' signals from pff
# pff_hit / pff_hurry / pff_sack =1
pff_pressure <- pff %>%
  filter(pff_role == "Pass Rush") %>%
  group_by(gameId, playId) %>%
  summarise(
    actual_pressure = as.integer(any(pff_hit == 1 | pff_hurry == 1 | pff_sack == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_rushers       = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

---

## 4. 核心函数：计算 PRSS（Pocket Rate of Space Shrinkage）

```{r define-function}
relevant_positions <- c("QB", "OL", "DL", "LB", "TE", "CB", "S")

# k: rolling window size
compute_qb_area <- function(play_data, k) {

  # Find the snap frame and the pass/ sack / spike frame
  snap_vals    <- play_data$frameId[play_data$event == "ball_snap"]
  release_vals <- play_data$frameId[play_data$event %in%
                    c("pass_forward", "qb_sack", "qb_spike")]

  if (length(snap_vals) == 0 || length(release_vals) == 0) {
    return(tibble(qb = NA_character_, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  snap_frame    <- min(snap_vals,    na.rm = TRUE)
  release_frame <- min(release_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  if (!is.finite(snap_frame) || !is.finite(release_frame)) {
    return(tibble(qb = NA_character_, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  play_data <- play_data %>%
    filter(frameId >= snap_frame, frameId <= release_frame)

  # QB name
  qb_name <- play_data %>%
    filter(officialPosition == "QB") %>%
    distinct(displayName) %>%
    pull() %>%
    paste(collapse = "/")

  frames <- unique(play_data$frameId)

  # 需要至少 k+1 帧才能计算滚动均值
  if (length(frames) < (k + 1)) {
    return(tibble(qb = qb_name, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  # 逐帧计算QB的Voronoi面积
  qb_areas <- map_dfr(frames, function(f) {
    frame_data <- play_data %>%
      filter(
        frameId == f,
        !is.na(x), !is.na(y),
        officialPosition %in% relevant_positions
      ) %>%
      distinct(x, y, .keep_all = TRUE)

    if (nrow(frame_data) < 3) return(tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = NA_real_))

    tryCatch({
      vor    <- deldir(frame_data$x, frame_data$y)
      vor_df <- vor$summary %>%
        select(x, y, dir.area) %>%
        left_join(frame_data, by = c("x", "y"))
      qb_area <- vor_df %>%
        filter(officialPosition == "QB") %>%
        pull(dir.area)
      tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = ifelse(length(qb_area) > 0, qb_area[1], NA_real_))
    }, error = function(e) tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = NA_real_))
  }) %>%
    arrange(frameId) %>%
    mutate(
      rate_change = c(NA, diff(qb_area)),
      rolling_avg = suppressWarnings(
        zoo::rollmean(rate_change, k = k, align = "left", fill = NA)
      )
    )

  max_neg <- suppressWarnings(min(qb_areas$rolling_avg, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(max_neg)) max_neg <- NA_real_

  tibble(qb = qb_name, max_neg_change = max_neg)
}
```

---

## 5. 对 k = 3, 5, 7, 10 批量计算

```{r}
play_list <- tracking %>%
  group_by(gameId, playId) %>%
  nest()

results <- vector("list", nrow(play_list))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(play_list))) {
  if (i %% 100 == 0) message("Progress: ", i, "/", nrow(play_list))
  results[[i]] <- compute_qb_area(play_list$data[[i]], k = 5)
}

all_summary_k5 <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  bind_cols(play_list %>% select(gameId, playId))


# 跑完立刻保存，防止丢失
saveRDS(all_summary_k5, "../data/processed/all_summary_k5.rds")
```
```{r}
final_data <- all_summary_k5 %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_neg_change), !is.na(qb)) %>%
  left_join(
    plays %>% select(gameId, playId, possessionTeam, 
                     passResult, prePenaltyPlayResult),
    by = c("gameId", "playId")
  ) %>%
  left_join(pff_pressure, by = c("gameId", "playId"))
```

```{r}
# 画第一张图：PRSS 分布
ggplot(final_data, aes(x = max_neg_change)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of PRSS (k=5)",
    x = "PRSS (negative = pocket collapsing)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# 画第二张图：PRSS vs playResult
ggplot(final_data, aes(x = max_neg_change, y = prePenaltyPlayResult)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "lightcoral") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "PRSS vs Play Result (yards gained)",
    x = "PRSS",
    y = "Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# 简单相关性
cor(final_data$max_neg_change, final_data$prePenaltyPlayResult, use = "complete.obs")
```

```{r}
# k=5 已有，直接复用
k5 <- all_summary_k5 %>% mutate(window = as.factor(5))

# 只跑 k=3, 7, 10
window_sizes <- c(3, 7, 10)
all_results <- vector("list", length(window_sizes))

for (w in seq_along(window_sizes)) {
  k <- window_sizes[w]
  message("Computing k = ", k, " ...")
  
  results_k <- vector("list", nrow(play_list))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(play_list))) {
    if (i %% 500 == 0) message("  k=", k, " Progress: ", i, "/", nrow(play_list))
    results_k[[i]] <- compute_qb_area(play_list$data[[i]], k = k)
  }
  
  all_results[[w]] <- play_list %>%
    select(gameId, playId) %>%
    bind_cols(bind_rows(results_k)) %>%
    mutate(window = as.factor(k))
}

# 合并所有窗口包括k=5
all_summaries <- bind_rows(all_results) %>%
  bind_rows(k5)

saveRDS(all_summaries, "../data/processed/all_summaries_all_windows.rds")
```





---

## 6. 合并外部数据

```{r merge-data, message=FALSE}
# BUG FIX: 原来只用 playId join，但 playId 跨 gameId 不唯一
# 必须用 gameId + playId 联合 join
# nflfastR 字段名是 game_id / play_id，需要先重命名
pbp <- nflfastR::load_pbp(2021) %>%
  mutate(
    gameId = as.numeric(game_id),
    playId = as.numeric(play_id)
  ) %>%
  select(gameId, playId, yards_gained)

all_summaries <- all_summaries %>%
  mutate(
    gameId = as.numeric(gameId),
    playId = as.numeric(playId)
  ) %>%
  # BUG FIX: 用 gameId + playId 联合 join
  left_join(pbp,         by = c("gameId", "playId")) %>%
  left_join(plays_clean, by = c("gameId", "playId")) %>%
  left_join(pff_pressure,by = c("gameId", "playId")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_neg_change), !is.na(yards_gained))
```

---

## 7. 可视化对比

### 图1：四个窗口 PRSS vs yards_gained（Facet 散点图）

```{r plot-scatter-facet}
ggplot(all_summaries, aes(x = abs(max_neg_change), y = yards_gained)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "lightcoral", size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~window, labeller = label_both) +
  labs(
    title = "PRSS vs Yards Gained — Rolling Window Comparison",
    x     = "PRSS (abs max neg change)",
    y     = "Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

### 图2：分箱回归线叠加（四条线放在一张图）

```{r plot-binned-overlay}
binned_all <- all_summaries %>%
  group_by(window) %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(
    abs(max_neg_change),
    breaks = seq(0, max(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE), by = 2)
  )) %>%
  group_by(window, bin) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_neg_change   = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards_gained = mean(yards_gained,        na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bin))

ggplot(binned_all, aes(x = avg_neg_change, y = avg_yards_gained, color = window)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title  = "Binned Avg Yards Gained vs Avg PRSS — All Windows Overlaid",
    x      = "Avg PRSS (per bin)",
    y      = "Avg Yards Gained",
    color  = "Rolling Window (k)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

### 图3：各窗口回归斜率 & R² 对比

```{r plot-model-stats}
model_stats <- all_summaries %>%
  group_by(window) %>%
  summarise(
    r_squared = summary(lm(yards_gained ~ abs(max_neg_change)))$r.squared,
    slope     = coef(lm(yards_gained ~ abs(max_neg_change)))[2],
    n_plays   = n(),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

print(model_stats)

ggplot(model_stats, aes(x = window, y = slope, fill = window)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(slope, 3)), vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Regression Slope by Rolling Window Size",
    x     = "Rolling Window (k)",
    y     = "Slope (yards per unit PRSS)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

ggplot(model_stats, aes(x = window, y = r_squared, fill = window)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(r_squared, 4)), vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "R-Squared by Rolling Window Size",
    x     = "Rolling Window (k)",
    y     = "R²"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

### 图4：PRSS 分布密度图（k 越大分布越平滑）

```{r plot-density}
ggplot(all_summaries, aes(x = abs(max_neg_change), fill = window, color = window)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of PRSS by Rolling Window Size",
    x     = "PRSS",
    y     = "Density",
    fill  = "Window (k)",
    color = "Window (k)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

### 图5：QB排名稳定性（不同k下排名变化幅度）

```{r plot-qb-rank-stability}
qb_by_window <- all_summaries %>%
  filter(!is.na(qb), qb != "") %>%
  group_by(window, qb) %>%
  summarise(avg_prss = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(window) %>%
  mutate(prss_rank = rank(avg_prss)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 只保留在所有窗口都出现的QB
common_qbs <- qb_by_window %>%
  count(qb) %>%
  filter(n == length(window_sizes)) %>%
  pull(qb)

qb_by_window %>%
  filter(qb %in% common_qbs) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = window, y = prss_rank, group = qb, color = qb)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "QB PRSS Rank Stability Across Rolling Windows",
    x     = "Rolling Window (k)",
    y     = "PRSS Rank (lower = less pressure faced)",
    color = "QB"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

---

### 图6：PRSS 指标验证 — 与真实压力事件对比（pffScoutingData）

```{r plot-validation}
# 用 actual_pressure（pff真实标注）验证PRSS是否有效
# 若PRSS有意义，actual_pressure=1的play应有更高PRSS
validation_data <- all_summaries %>%
  filter(!is.na(actual_pressure), window == 5)  # 用k=5做验证

ggplot(validation_data,
       aes(x = factor(actual_pressure, labels = c("No Pressure", "Pressure")),
           y = abs(max_neg_change),
           fill = factor(actual_pressure))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  labs(
    title = "PRSS Distribution: Actual Pressure vs No Pressure (k=5)",
    x     = "PFF Pressure Label",
    y     = "PRSS"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

# t检验：两组均值是否显著不同
t_result <- t.test(
  abs(max_neg_change) ~ actual_pressure,
  data = validation_data
)
print(t_result)
```

---

### 图7：球队 PRSS 排名（k=5）

```{r plot-team-prss}
team_summary <- all_summaries %>%
  filter(window == 5, !is.na(possessionTeam)) %>%
  group_by(possessionTeam) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_prss  = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards = mean(yards_gained,        na.rm = TRUE),
    n_plays   = n(),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_prss))

ggplot(team_summary, aes(x = reorder(possessionTeam, avg_prss), y = avg_prss)) +
  geom_col(fill = "tomato", alpha = 0.85) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Avg PRSS by Offensive Team (k=5, Weeks 1-5)",
    x     = "Team",
    y     = "Avg PRSS (higher = more pocket collapse)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```
